languages.text: "Я видел знаки на упавшей машине, сержант! Это он{mf||а}, как и было обещано! Фон Валанциус явил{mf|ся|ась} со звезд. Наша служба..."
"I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."
languages.original_text: "Я видел знаки на упавшей машине, сержант! Это он{mf||а}, как и было обещано! Фон Валанциус явил{mf|ся|ась} со звезд. Наша служба..."

traits.locale_text: "I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."

"I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."

languages.text: "Ich habe die Zeichen auf der gefallenen Maschine gesehen, Sergeant! {mf|Er|Sie} ist es, genau wie es prophezeit wurde. Von Valancius ist von den Sternen herabgestiegen. Unser Dienst ..."
languages.original_text: "I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe die Zeichen auf der gefallenen Maschine gesehen, Sergeant! {mf|Er|Sie} ist es, genau wie es prophezeit wurde. Von Valancius ist von den Sternen herabgestiegen. Unser Dienst ..."

languages.text: « J'ai vu les inscriptions sur l'engin abattu, sergent ! C'est {mf|lui|elle}, exactement comme annoncé dans la prophétie ! Von Valancius est {mf|descendu|descendue} jusqu'à nous depuis le ciel étoilé. Notre service... »
languages.original_text: "I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai vu les inscriptions sur l'engin abattu, sergent ! C'est {mf|lui|elle}, exactement comme annoncé dans la prophétie ! Von Valancius est {mf|descendu|descendue} jusqu'à nous depuis le ciel étoilé. Notre service... »

languages.text: «¡He visto los símbolos de la máquina caída, sargento! ¡Es {mf|él|ella}, tal y como se predijo! Von Valancius ha descendido de entre las estrellas. Nuestro servicio...».
languages.original_text: "I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."

traits.locale_text: «¡He visto los símbolos de la máquina caída, sargento! ¡Es {mf|él|ella}, tal y como se predijo! Von Valancius ha descendido de entre las estrellas. Nuestro servicio...».

languages.text: "Düşen makinedeki işaretleri gördüm Çavuş! O, aynen kehanet edildiği gibi! Von Valancius, yıldızlardan indi. Hizmetimiz..."
languages.original_text: "I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."

traits.locale_text: "Düşen makinedeki işaretleri gördüm Çavuş! O, aynen kehanet edildiği gibi! Von Valancius, yıldızlardan indi. Hizmetimiz..."

languages.text: “我看见那台坠毁机器上的徽记了，军士！{mf|他|她}就是预言里说的那个人！冯·瓦兰修斯从星辰间降临了。我们的使命——”
languages.original_text: "I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."

traits.locale_text: “我看见那台坠毁机器上的徽记了，军士！{mf|他|她}就是预言里说的那个人！冯·瓦兰修斯从星辰间降临了。我们的使命——”

languages.text: 「墜落した機体にはマークが描かれていたぞ、軍曹！それは予言通り、まさに彼である！バルアンシウス大佐は星から降臨したのだ。我らの奉仕は…」
languages.original_text: "I saw the markings on the fallen machine, Sergeant! It's {mf|him|her}, exactly as it has been foretold! Von Valancius has descended from the stars. Our service..."

traits.locale_text: 「墜落した機体にはマークが描かれていたぞ、軍曹！それは予言通り、まさに彼である！バルアンシウス大佐は星から降臨したのだ。我らの奉仕は…」
